reference: How may I help you today? Yeah I've had, a fever and a cough that started just like four days ago. OK, when did you, when did you start having your, so the cough started four days ago, what about the fever? I think, like, last night was when I checked, it was high, like over thirty eight. I see, OK. And, did you check your fever before that? The night before? Yeah, I just checked it last night. I felt hot previously, but, I don't know, I thought I was going to just get better, but this morning still, well, feeling a bit a little bit worse. OK, and the cough that started four days ago, has it been a dry cough or wet cough? It's been dry. OK, so there's been no sputum or any, or blood? No sputum or blood OK. Has it gotten worse over the past four days? Uh, a little bit, yeah. D; And, other than the fever and the cough, do you have any fatigue? Uhm, yes. We do, OK. Any muscle aches? Uh, no. OK, Sore throat? No. Any difficulties breathing? No. Any wheezing? No. Any chest pain or pressure? No. OK, any runny nose? Yeah, my nose has been a little bit runny. OK, that started over the past four days as well? Yeah. OK, what about pain in your belly? No pain. OK, any diarrhea or Constipation? Uhm, no. Any nausea or vomitting? No. Any urinary symptoms? No. OK, any rash that you've noticed on your skin? No. Any changes in your sense of taste or your sense of smell? Uh, yeah, I haven't been able to smell as well. You feel like you have a runny nose, but is it sort of congested? Not really, it, yeah, just kind of running, and yeah, I haven't been able to smell very well. OK, and do you have any past medical, any conditions, medical conditions? Uh, depression and anxiety. And have you had any surgeries in the past or hospitalizations? Uhm, no OK, are you taking any medications, including over the counter pills? I do take a multi-vitamin. And, uh. sorry I do take, um, I take, uh, an SSRI, Citalopram as well. OK, that's good. OK, any allergies? No allergies OK, specifically allergies to medications? Uhm, yeah no, no medications, I don't think so. Good, ok, and do you currently smoke or have you ever smoked in the past? Uhm, I smoked when I was in high school very briefly, but I haven't smoked anything in the last twenty years. Alright, do you consume marijuana? Uh, we'll use edibles every once in a while. I buy them from the, like, I guess government store, OCS. I see, OK, any recreational drugs? No, OK, and do you currently live alone or do you live with others? I live with others, I live with my girlfriend, and a dog. OK, and has she been sick or have you been in contact with anyone who's been sick recently? Uh, she just came back from a work trip. I've been working from home but she was, uhm, in Saskatchewan, and just got back last week. OK, and has she had any symptoms? She's been fatigued since coming back, but I mean, we thought that was maybe just from the travels, but, maybe not. Has she been quarantining, or are you both spending time together? Well, we've been, I mean, trying to distance in the home, but I mean, we've been living together in an apartment so. Fair enough, fair enough. OK, have you had any travels? No, I've been working from home. OK, alright, and uh, any, you don't have any asthma or COPD or any lung conditions, right? Right, I don't have anything like that. OK, and, any conditions that run in your family? Uhm, no, nothing that runs in the family. Alright, OK, so if I understand correctly, you've been feeling tired and you've had a cough and a runny nose and changes in your sense of smell for the past three or four days and you also were feeling a little bit hot and yesterday you noticed that you had spiked a high fever. Is there anything that I'm missing? No, I think that covers all the symptoms. And you might have potentially had, some exposure through your girlfriend potentially, so it's possible that, well, it's possible that you just have a cold, but it's also, we'll still have to rule out covid as a cause, and so we'll have to do a covid swab and go from there and we'll check your temperature here as well. Just, uh, I think something that I forgot to ask, have you taken any medications that has helped you with your symptoms? Uh no, I haven't taken anything. OK, alright, well, thank you, I'll go talk to my attending and we'll come back and discuss this further with you. That sounds great. Thank you.
